headline: Palantir (NASDAQ:PLTR) Passes Navellier’s Eight Growth Rules with Flying Colors
summary: Palantir (PLTR) passes a disciplined eight-point growth screen, showing surging earnings, 51% analyst revisions, and 319% cash flow growth. Despite a high P/E, its explosive fundamentals make it a standout for growth investors.

headline: David Sacks Rips Bernie Sanders' 50% AI Ownership Plan, Warns It Could Lead To China's 'CCP-Style' Social Credit System— 'I Can See Why...'
summary: David Sacks said Bernie Sanders' AI ownership plan could lead to dangerous government-controlled artificial intelligence systems.

headline: Why Palantir Stock Sank Today
summary: Palantir hasn't participated in this year's AI rally, but that doesn't mean it's immune to new valuation pressures in the space.
